label: make.create (X makes Y — because of what X does, Y comes to exist; as in "make a chair" / "make a cake", NOT as in "make someone sad" or "make the bed" or "make the train")
pattern: gist §3.4 creation pattern: BECAUSE(effect: THERE-IS x, cause: DO agent) — carried byte-identical from urn:kernel-v0:make (SEED disposition)
gloss: because X did something at some time, there is this something; before this time it was not.
notes: SEED from urn:kernel-v0:make (deprecated): the v0 explication already describes exactly the creation sense and is carried BYTE-IDENTICAL, so the content-addressed urn:kot: mint equals the v0 mint (continuity demonstrated in the manifest). Within-frame cluster of three agentive-creation synsets disclosed per R3 (shape / combine / manufacture — one explication truthfully covers all three; frame projection to Intentionally_create hand-reviewed per R2). Non-creation idioms ('make the bed', 'make the train', 'make merry') are excluded siblings — exactly the g2:pi:070 escapes no gloss short of a sense record could exclude.

sense.glossQuote: make by shaping or bringing together constituents; "make a dress"; "make a cake"; "make a wall of stones"
